introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in San Diego, The Azizi Firm is here to help. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents throughout America's Finest City. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our San Diego car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions, T-bone accidents, head-on collisions, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and bicycle accidents which are common in San Diego's bike-friendly neighborhoods.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in San Diego
sections.body: San Diego's busy freeways (I-5, I-8, I-15, SR-163, SR-52) see heavy commuter and tourist traffic leading to frequent collisions. Common causes include distracted driving, speeding on open stretches, intoxicated driving especially near downtown and Pacific Beach, unsafe merging near the I-5/I-8 interchange, and sun glare during coastal commutes. Our attorneys conduct thorough investigations to identify all liable parties.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in San Diego?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention immediately, document the scene with photos including traffic conditions, exchange information with all involved drivers, obtain witness contact information, and contact a car accident lawyer before giving any statements to insurance companies.

faq.question: How much is my San Diego car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, long-term care needs, and available insurance coverage. California's comparative negligence rules may also play a role. We offer free case evaluations to assess your claim.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We use this experience to maximize your recovery and won't let insurance companies take advantage of you. We understand San Diego courts and have extensive experience with local judges and opposing counsel.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in San Diego, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
